# Platform Notes: Google Ads

## Best uses

- Search intent capture
- Responsive search ads
- Performance Max
- AI Max for Search
- Experiments
- Reporting

## Agent rules

- Use query intent as the organizing structure
- Generate many headline/description variants
- Use experiments for controlled tests
- Use Search/SearchStream exports for learning memory

## Required campaign artifact sections

- Objective
- Buyer state
- Tactic
- Offer
- Creative/copy variants
- Landing page
- Metrics
- Launch notes
- Learning update path
